2605.00731.title: Empowering Heterogeneous Graph Foundation Models via Decoupled Relation Alignment
2605.00731.paper_summary: While Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) have achieved remarkable success in homogeneous graphs, extending them to multi-domain heterogeneous graphs (MDHGs) remains a formidable challenge due to cross-type feature shifts and intra-domain relation gaps. Existing global feature alignment methods (PCA or SVD) enforce a shared feature space blindly, which distorts type-specific semantics and disrupts original topologies, inevitably leading to "Type Collapse" and "Relation Confusion". To address these fundamental limitations, we propose Decoupled relation Subspace Alignment (DRSA), a novel, plug-and-play relation-driven alignment framework. DRSA fundamentally shifts the paradigm by decoupling feature semantics from relation structures. Specifically, it introduces a dual-relation subspace projection mechanism to coordinate cross-type interactions within a shared low-rank relation subspace explicitly. Furthermore, a feature-structure decoupled representation is designed to decompose aligned features into a semantic projection component and a structural residual term, adaptively absorbing intra-domain variations. Optimized via a stable alternating minimization strategy based on Block Coordinate Descent, DRSA constructs a well-calibrated, structure-aware latent space. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that DRSA can be seamlessly integrated as a universal preprocessing module, significantly and consistently enhancing the cross-domain and few-shot knowledge transfer capabilities of state-of-the-art GFMs. The code is available at: https://github.com/zhengziyu77/DSRA.
2605.00731.paper_summary_zh: 雖然圖形基礎模型（GFMs）在同質圖中取得了顯著成功，但將其擴展到多領域異質圖（MDHGs）仍然是一個艱巨的挑戰，因為存在跨類型特徵轉移和域內關係差距。現有的全球特徵對齊方法（PCA或SVD）盲目強制共享特徵空間，這會扭曲類型特定的語義並破壞原始拓撲，必然導致“類型崩潰”和“關係混淆”。為了解決這些基本限制，我們提出了解耦關係子空間對齊（DRSA），這是一種新穎的即插即用關係驅動對齊框架。DRSA 從根本上改變了範式，通過將特徵語義與關係結構解耦。具體而言，它引入了一種雙關係子空間投影機制，以明確協調共享低秩關係子空間中的跨類型交互。此外，設計了一種特徵-結構解耦表示，以將對齊特徵分解為語義投影組件和結構殘差項，自適應地吸收域內變化。通過基於區塊坐標下降的穩定交替最小化策略進行優化，DRSA 構建了一個良好校準的結構感知潛在空間。在多個現實世界基準數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，DRSA 可以無縫集成作為通用預處理模塊，顯著且持續地增強最先進的 GFMs 的跨域和少樣本知識轉移能力。代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/zhengziyu77/DSRA。
2605.00731.author: Ziyu Zheng et.al.
2605.00731.authors: Ziyu Zheng, Yaming Yang, Zhe Wang, Ziyu Guan, Wei Zhao
